---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# product shadows

## basic production

### dense shadows

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", 6);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(measurement_group);
```

### factorized shadows

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", 6);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
factorized_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(measurement_group);
```

## error correction

```{julia}
# Prepare classical state
using RandomMeas
N = 6
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
ψ0 = MPS(siteindices, fill("1", N))
```

```{julia}
# get the calibration vector
using NPZ
classical_measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/classical_group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
calibration_vec = get_calibration_vector(ψ0, classical_measurement_group)
npzwrite(
    "./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz",
    Dict(
        "calibration" => calibration_vec
    ),
)
```

```{julia}
# calibrated shadows 
calibration_data = npzread("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(measurement_group, G=calibration_vec);
```

## reduced shadows

```{julia}
# calibration 
using NPZ
calibration_data = npzread("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
```

```{julia}
# product shadows of subsystem.
using RandomMeas
N = 6
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
subrange = [1, 2];
subgroup = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, subrange);
sub_dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(subgroup, G=calibration_vec[subrange]);
```

```{julia}
get_trace_moment(sub_dense_shadows, 2)
```
